title: Implement Navigation and Call-to-Action Elements
description: Add navigation bar, sign up/login buttons, and primary call-to-action to the landing page.
details: Integrate the existing navigation bar at the top. Add prominent sign up/login buttons and a main call-to-action (e.g., 'Shop Now') in the hero section. Ensure all links and buttons are accessible and route correctly.
test_strategy: Test navigation links and buttons for correct routing and accessibility. Use keyboard navigation to verify focus states.

title: Write Unit and Integration Tests for Landing Page
description: Develop comprehensive tests for landing page components and data flows using Jest and React Testing Library.
details: Write unit tests for each component (hero, carousel, featured products). Add integration tests for the landing page as a whole, covering user interactions, API calls, and edge cases (loading, error, empty states).
test_strategy: Run all tests and ensure 100% pass rate. Use coverage tools to verify critical paths are tested. Test with mocked API responses for recommendations and featured products.

title: Design Landing Page Layout and Components
description: Create the visual structure and React components for the AI-Shop landing page, including hero banner, featured products, and recommendation carousel.
details: Use Next.js with Tailwind CSS to design a responsive landing page. The layout should include: a hero banner with a call-to-action, a featured products section, and a personalized recommendation carousel placeholder. Ensure accessibility (WCAG AA) and mobile responsiveness. Components should be modular and reusable.
test_strategy: Verify layout on multiple screen sizes and browsers. Use accessibility tools (axe, Lighthouse) to check compliance. Confirm that all components render correctly and are keyboard-navigable.

title: Integrate AI-Powered Recommendation Carousel
description: Implement the personalized recommendation carousel on the landing page using the AI recommendations API.
details: Connect the carousel component to the backend API that provides personalized product recommendations (using OpenAI GPT-4 or in-house model). Handle loading, error, and empty states gracefully. Display recommended products with images, names, and quick-add-to-cart buttons.
test_strategy: Mock API responses to test loading, error, and success states. Validate that recommendations update based on user context (if available).

title: Display Featured Products Section
description: Fetch and display a curated list of featured products on the landing page.
details: Query the backend (or use a static list for MVP) to retrieve featured products. Render them in a visually appealing grid with product images, names, prices, and links to detail pages. Ensure the section is accessible and responsive.
test_strategy: Test with various product counts (including zero). Check that product links navigate correctly. Validate responsiveness and accessibility.
